title: SGPGIMS – Senior Resident, Junior Resident – 33 Posts

basic_details.job_title: SGPGIMS Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 33 Senior Resident, Junior Resident Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) Recruitment 2026 for 33 posts of Senior Resident (Hospital Services) / Junior Resident (Non-academic). Candidates with MS/DNB Can attend walkin.The Walk-in on 29-05-2026. For detailed information please visit SGPGIMS official website.

qualification.education_qualification: MS/DNB (General Surgery), MD/MS/DNB (Obstetrics & Gynaecology), M.D/ DNB. (P.M.R) /M.D.(Medicine) with Diploma in PMR/M.S. (General Surgery) /M.S.(Orthopaedics), MBBS inclusive 01-year internship, Forensic Medicine, Trauma Surgery / General Surgery, Oral and maxillofacial surgery
